title: Koanophyllon galeottii

taxonomy: Koanophyllon galeottii is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. This plant is native to Mexico and Central America. It belongs to the tribe Mutisieae, which is a group of flowering plants characterized by their daisy-like flowers. Koanophyllon galeottii is a relatively rare species, and its classification is mainly based on its morphological characteristics and molecular analysis. Further research is needed to fully understand its relationships within the Asteraceae family.
